resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def evenOddBit(self, n: int) -> List[int]:
        even = odd = 0
        idx = 0
        while n:
            if n & 1:
                if idx & 1 == 0:
                    even += 1
                else:
                    odd += 1
            n >>= 1
            idx += 1
        return [even, odd]
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Iterate through each bit of n once, counting 1s at even and odd indices. Uses bitwise operations for minimal CPU cycles and memory.
